exceptions.title: Bank account mismatch – possible fraud risk
exceptions.description: Bank account on invoice (NEW-BANK-999) differs from vendor master (BANK-001-ACME)
exceptions.recommendation: Verify bank details directly with vendor before payment

exceptions.title: No GRN for 3-way matching
exceptions.description: GRN required for goods invoices but none found
exceptions.recommendation: Obtain goods receipt confirmation before payment

exceptions.title: Missing vendor tax/VAT ID
exceptions.description: Vendor tax ID is required but not present on invoice
exceptions.recommendation: Request vendor tax ID before processing

exceptions.title: Suspiciously round amount
exceptions.description: Invoice amount 48000.0 is a round number – may warrant review

exceptions.title: Amount just under approval threshold ($50,000.00)
exceptions.description: Invoice amount $48,000.00 is within 5.0% below the $50,000.00 approval threshold

follow_up_actions: Verify bank details directly with vendor before payment
Obtain goods receipt confirmation before payment
Request vendor tax ID before processing
evidence_summary: [CRITICAL] Bank account mismatch – possible fraud risk (evidence: vendor_master)
